response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The video is entirely conversational, matching the topical shifts outlined in the Reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was used to identify the speakers and the general context (birthdays, photo-taking, poll announcement); manual transcription and translation were performed for all dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings are strictly anchored to vocal onset. Aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions were applied to handle the rapid back-and-forth between Hoshimachi Suisei and Mori Calliope.

subtitles.original: メジャーデビューした時のライブで一緒に歌わせてもらいましたね。
subtitles.english: We got to sing together at the live for our major debut, didn't we?

subtitles.original: 懐かしい。
subtitles.english: How nostalgic.

subtitles.original: ね、懐かしい。
subtitles.english: Yeah, nostalgic.

subtitles.original: これ、なんかこんなんもやってなくない？
subtitles.english: Hey, don't you want to do something like this?

subtitles.original: やりました。たくさんやりました。
subtitles.english: We did. We did it a lot.

subtitles.original: やばいよね、めっちゃいい思い出ですよ。
subtitles.english: It's crazy, right? It's such a great memory.

subtitles.original: ね、覚えててくれたね、それ。
subtitles.english: Yeah, you remembered that.

subtitles.original: 久しぶりに歌えて嬉しいね。
subtitles.english: It's nice to be able to sing it after a long time.

subtitles.original: 懐かしいポイント。
subtitles.english: Nostalgic point.

subtitles.original: ありがとう。
subtitles.english: Thank you.

subtitles.original: そうですね、今回「Caramel Pain」一緒に歌いました。
subtitles.english: That's right, we sang "Caramel Pain" together this time.

subtitles.original: 一番好きな星街すいせい曲です！
subtitles.english: It's my favorite Hoshimachi Suisei song!

subtitles.original: わー、嬉しい！イェーイ、やったー！
subtitles.english: Wow, I'm so happy! Yay, I did it!

subtitles.original: めっちゃいい感じだったね、ハモリとかもね。
subtitles.english: It felt really good, the harmonies and everything.

subtitles.original: ありがとう。たくさん練習しました。
subtitles.english: Thank you. We practiced a lot.

subtitles.original: ねー、本当に綺麗だったぜ。
subtitles.english: Yeah, it was really beautiful.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: ちなみに、ほら、ピカピカストーン！
subtitles.english: By the way, look, a shiny stone!

subtitles.original: Wow, beautiful!
subtitles.english: Wow, beautiful!

subtitles.original: 素敵ですよね。
subtitles.english: It's lovely, isn't it?

subtitles.original: So taking!
subtitles.english: So captivating!

subtitles.original: え、すいせい先輩。あたし知ってるけど、誕生日はいつですか？
subtitles.english: Um, Suisei-senpai. I already know, but when is your birthday?

subtitles.original: 私は3月の22！
subtitles.english: Mine is March 22nd!

subtitles.original: March 22! March 22! そうですね。
subtitles.english: March 22! March 22! That's right.

subtitles.original: せん、せん、せんげつ？
subtitles.english: Last... last... last month?

subtitles.original: そう、先月！
subtitles.english: Yes, last month!

subtitles.original: Yes! ですので、ほら、アクアマリンが誕生石で...
subtitles.english: Yes! So, look, Aquamarine is your birthstone...

subtitles.original: アクアマリンだ！
subtitles.english: It's Aquamarine!

subtitles.original: もうぴったりよね。私知らなかったよ、自分の誕生石アクアマリンって。
subtitles.english: It fits perfectly. I didn't know my birthstone was Aquamarine.

subtitles.original: そう、ぴったりですよ。マジで最高。
subtitles.english: Yes, it fits perfectly. Seriously the best.

subtitles.original: 同じ色だよ、もう。
subtitles.english: It's the same color already.

subtitles.original: 同じです！
subtitles.english: It's the same!

subtitles.original: 最高だぜ。
subtitles.english: It's the best.

subtitles.original: めっちゃ素敵ですよ。めっちゃ綺麗から、一緒に写真撮りましょう！
subtitles.english: It's so lovely. It's so beautiful, let's take a photo together!

subtitles.original: あ、撮ろう！いいですか？
subtitles.english: Oh, let's! Is it okay?

subtitles.original: Let's go! Let's go! Yeah!
subtitles.english: Let's go! Let's go! Yeah!

subtitles.original: 私ね、やりたいものある。
subtitles.english: I have something I want to do.

subtitles.original: Okay, what?
subtitles.english: Okay, what?

subtitles.original: これわかる？何のポーズか。
subtitles.english: Do you know what this is? What pose this is.

subtitles.original: No, ジョジョじゃない？
subtitles.english: No, isn't it JoJo?

subtitles.original: 違うよ。What's this?
subtitles.english: No it's not. What's this?

subtitles.original: GOLDEN BOWL!
subtitles.english: GOLDEN BOWL!

subtitles.original: そう！
subtitles.english: Right!

subtitles.original: これかっこいいよね。
subtitles.english: This is cool, isn't it.

subtitles.original: ありがとう。Thank you so much. え、ちゃんと見てくれた。ありがとう。
subtitles.english: Thank you. Thank you so much. Um, you actually watched it. Thank you.

subtitles.original: もちろん！大好きな曲ですよ。
subtitles.english: Of course! It's a song I love.

subtitles.original: Thank you so much, Senpai. え、ちなみに、everybody really quick before we keep going, お知らせあります！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much, Senpai. Um, by the way, everybody really quick before we keep going, I have an announcement!

subtitles.original: Yes! Quick announcement about members only! メンバー限定アンコールがありますよ！
subtitles.english: Yes! Quick announcement about members only! There's a members-only encore!

subtitles.original: やったー！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: A solo session, and we need to pick one song that I just performed with the amazing guests, and I'm gonna do a solo version of it. Yes!
subtitles.english: A solo session, and we need to pick one song that I just performed with the amazing guests, and I'm gonna do a solo version of it. Yes!

subtitles.original: So you have one minute starting now!
subtitles.english: So you have one minute starting now!

subtitles.original: 1分ありますよ！投票！
subtitles.english: You have one minute! Vote!

subtitles.original: あの、カリオペはソロで歌いますよ。
subtitles.english: Um, Calliope will sing solo.

subtitles.original: さっきゲストと一緒に歌った曲、please vote!
subtitles.english: The songs she just sang with the guests, please vote!

subtitles.original: Everybody you have one minute, go!
subtitles.english: Everybody you have one minute, go!

subtitles.original: 選んでね！この後のメン限でソロで歌ってくれるらしいですよ。
subtitles.english: Please choose! Apparently she'll sing solo during the members-only stream after this.

subtitles.original: Yes!
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: えー、全部聴きたいよ！
subtitles.english: Eh, I want to hear them all!

subtitles.original: そうだね。全部めっちゃめっちゃいい曲、全ての。やばいよ。
subtitles.english: That's true. They're all really, really good songs, all of them. It's crazy.

subtitles.original: でも、1曲だけ。Only one!
subtitles.english: But, only one song. Only one!

subtitles.original: ね、1曲だけですよ。選んでくださいね。
subtitles.english: Yeah, only one song. Please choose.

subtitles.original: 選んでね、please, お願いします。
subtitles.english: Please choose, please, I beg you.

subtitles.original: どれがいいかな、どれがいいかな。Okay, お願いします。
subtitles.english: I wonder which one's good, I wonder which one's good. Okay, please.

subtitles.original: あー、楽しみ。頑張ります。
subtitles.english: Ah, I'm looking forward to it. I'll do my best.

subtitles.original: ね。
subtitles.english: Yeah.

subtitles.original: いや、カリオペ本当にね、4...4年？
subtitles.english: No, Calliope, really... 4... 4 years?

subtitles.original: メジャーデビューして4年。本当に駆け抜けてきたよね。
subtitles.english: It's been 4 years since the major debut. We've really run through it, haven't we?

subtitles.original: そう、色々やってますよ。
subtitles.english: Yes, we're doing all sorts of things.

subtitles.original: なんかアニメのタイアップとかもね、たくさん決まって。
subtitles.english: Like anime tie-ups and stuff, a lot of them have been decided.

subtitles.original: 来ました。来ました。
subtitles.english: They came. They came.

subtitles.original: So my dream...
subtitles.english: So my dream...

subtitles.original: ね、嬉しい。
subtitles.english: Yeah, I'm happy.

subtitles.original: そうですね、夢が叶えた。
subtitles.english: That's right, the dream came true.

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: すごい！めっちゃ嬉しい。
subtitles.english: Amazing! I'm so happy.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: 皆さんのおかげで。素敵な先輩のおかげでも。
subtitles.english: Thanks to everyone. And thanks to my wonderful senpai too.

subtitles.original: My inspiration. Thank you so much, everybody.
subtitles.english: My inspiration. Thank you so much, everybody.

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: Yay! So keep shooting for the moon. Yeah.
subtitles.english: Yay! So keep shooting for the moon. Yeah.

subtitles.original: そうだよ。うん。
subtitles.english: That's right. Yeah.

subtitles.original: Oh, let's see. Oh, okay. Well, everybody's writing what they want. Oh, okay, すごいすごい。
subtitles.english: Oh, let's see. Oh, okay. Well, everybody's writing what they want. Oh, okay, amazing, amazing.

subtitles.original: 今好きな曲...
subtitles.english: The songs you like now...

subtitles.original: おー、すごいすごい！本当にね。わー、すごい！Many many many many!
subtitles.english: Oh, amazing, amazing! Really. Wow, amazing! Many many many many!

subtitles.original: 投票がまだまだ...
subtitles.english: The voting is still going...

subtitles.original: Go, go, go! Choose, choose, choose! 選んで、選んで！選んだ？
subtitles.english: Go, go, go! Choose, choose, choose! Choose, choose! Did you choose?

subtitles.original: 始めて...始めている？投票もう少し長くやりますってよ。
subtitles.english: It's started... it's started? They say they'll keep the voting open a little longer.

subtitles.original: うん、オッケー。
subtitles.english: Yeah, okay.

subtitles.original: A little bit longer. Longer, longer time.
subtitles.english: A little bit longer. Longer, longer time.

subtitles.original: Yes, please choose one. It's hard, 難しいと思うけど。Yeah.
subtitles.english: Yes, please choose one. It's hard, I think it's difficult. Yeah.

subtitles.original: Eh, let's drink water.
subtitles.english: Eh, let's drink water.

subtitles.original: あ、確かに。水乾杯？いいですか？
subtitles.english: Ah, certainly. A water toast? Is it okay?

subtitles.original: 飲みましょう。はい。オッケー。うん。
subtitles.english: Let's drink. Yes. Okay. Yeah.

subtitles.original: チア！ CHEERS!
subtitles.english: CHEE-A! CHEERS!

subtitles.original: Thank you Senpai. Japanese "Cheers" 何だと思う？
subtitles.english: Thank you Senpai. What do you think the Japanese for "Cheers" is?

subtitles.original: うん、乾杯。乾杯。
subtitles.english: Yeah, kanpai. Kanpai.

subtitles.original: 最近の流行りなんて言うと思う？
subtitles.english: What do you think the recent trend is called?

subtitles.original: Um, Cheers?
subtitles.english: Um, Cheers?

subtitles.original: ケーピー！ KP!
subtitles.english: KP! KP!

subtitles.original: KP! KP!
subtitles.english: KP! KP!

subtitles.original: そうね。え、たくさん使いたいと思う。
subtitles.english: Right. Um, I want to use it a lot.

subtitles.original: 使ってください。乾杯だけでKP。KP! KP!
subtitles.english: Please use it. KP just for kanpai. KP! KP!

subtitles.original: Hey hey. パリピポが使ってますよ。
subtitles.english: Hey hey. Party people are using it.

subtitles.original: パリピポ！カリオペパリピじゃないけど、使えます。使えます。
subtitles.english: Party people! Calliope is not a party person, but you can use it. You can use it.

subtitles.original: Pari-pi-poo in the house let's go! はい。
subtitles.english: Party people in the house let's go! Yes.

subtitles.original: いいね。Nice.
subtitles.english: It's good. Nice.

subtitles.original: All right, is the voting closed?
subtitles.english: All right, is the voting closed?

subtitles.original: どうかな、どうかな。決まったかな、決まったかな。
subtitles.english: I wonder, I wonder. Is it decided, is it decided?

subtitles.original: 決まったかな？ちょっとわかんない。
subtitles.english: Is it decided? I'm not sure.

subtitles.original: どうですか皆さん？「お水おいしい」だって。おいしい？
subtitles.english: How is it everyone? They're saying "The water is delicious". Is it?

subtitles.original: Okay. Oh, close? Oh...
subtitles.english: Okay. Oh, closed? Oh...
